/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_tcp_ingress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_fix_message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_fix_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_message_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_config_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_position_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_order_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_order_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_price_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_order_book_level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_matching_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_symbol_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_risk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_message_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fix_engine_tests.dir/tests/test_performance.cpp.o -o fix_engine_tests  libfix_engine_lib.a lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
